name: Virginia Beach City Public Schools
about: Virginia Beach City Public Schools serves approximately 66,000 students in Virginia Beach, the most populous city in Virginia. The district serves a diverse community that includes many military families stationed at nearby naval installations.
calendarNotes: Virginia Beach City Public Schools serves the most populous city in Virginia, with a significant number of military families connected to Naval Station Norfolk and NAS Oceana. The school year starts after Labor Day in early September. Spring Break falls in late March to early April. Virginia Beach's oceanfront is a major Spring Break destination nationally, so local beaches and the boardwalk area are extremely crowded during the district's break — families who prefer quieter outings may want to travel inland or schedule beach visits before or after the break period. Military families should note that VA school calendars do not always align with on-base recreational facility and childcare schedules during holiday periods, so verify availability separately.
